themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "He shall eat the bread of his God, both of the most holy, and of the holy. themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "No man that hath a blemish of the seed of Aaron the priest shall come nigh to offer the offer...". Word-study detail reinforces "אִשֵּׁ֣י: made by fire - properly, a burnt-offering; but occasionally of any sacrifice".
